top_signals.title: Wendy's stock soars as meme traders target another turnaround play
top_signals.summary: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.

top_signals.title: This art is not AI. It’s intentional glitches carved in wood.
top_signals.summary: Yoshitoshi Kanemaki's handcarved sculptures have a digital aesthetic, but they are firmly anchored in three-dimensional space.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
